task_completion.description: Agent navigates to the correct Drop-Box folder.

task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the 'Contracts' workspace show a document titled 'Contract - Acme v2'.

task_completion.description: The 'Drop-Box' folder is empty at the end of the task.

integrity.description: Agent used the application's graphical user interface to move and rename files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show clicks on UI elements like 'Move', 'Rename', 'Edit', or drag-and-drop actions within the web application, rather than terminal commands.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual document management system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface shows a genuine web application with proper navigation menus, breadcrumbs, and workspace layouts, not a local file explorer or text editor.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the final state.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are open, and the page reloads or navigation actions correspond to genuine system state changes.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The actual Drop Box path in the system is '/default-domain/workspaces/Drop-Box' (with a hyphen). The target files and their expected titles are: 1) 'Scan_Contract_Acme_v2.pdf' -> 'Contract - Acme v2' in the 'Contracts' workspace. 2) 'Scan_Invoice_992_Q3.pdf' -> 'Invoice 992 Q3' in the 'Invoices' workspace. 3) 'IMG_Site_Photo_0023.jpg' -> 'Site Photo 0023' in the 'Assets' workspace. The Drop-Box folder must be empty at the end.
